title: Recruits- Horns of War Addon
description: Adds effects to goat horns in minecraft which apply to recruits in range when horn is used.
body:
Adds effects and use to goat horns in war, same team recieves buffs and only enemy recieves debuffs.

Ponder    ---- +40 morale to allied recruits
Sing----    Regeneration I (10s)
Seek----    Temporary movement speed
Feel----    Knockback resistance
Admire----    Strength I
Call----    Rally recruits toward blower
Dream----    -20 Morale debuff to enemies

The morale used is from my recruitsmorale addon mod not default recruit morale.
All things are configurable from the config/serverconfig.



Enjoy the mod and do let me know if you have any bugs, suggestions or in general an opinion about this on my discord handle- amigokilo88

You can support me through my kofi.
